creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #15)

However, I'd say the code is still wrong after the patch, but at least it's not broken anymore.
By 'wrong' I mean it accepts only _one_ of the 'all', 'cache', 'logs', 'packages', 'wrkdirs'. Most likely it needs significant rework to support multiple arguments, e.g. when one wants to clean all but logs -- something like 'poudriere jail -d -j <jailname> -C cache,packages,wrkdirs'.
